executiveSummary: Iteration 000029 implements standalone binary distribution for NVST via Bun's --compile flag. All FRs and USs comply. Two minor improvements are applied: removal of the legacy release.yml workflow and addition of a smoke-test step in publish.yml.
minorObservations: Legacy release.yml (workflow_dispatch only) was superseded by publish.yml — removed.
No smoke-test step existed before refactor; added step to run nvst-linux-x64 --version after build.
Self-contained verification relies on Bun --compile design guarantee; no minimal-container test in CI.
Windows cross-compile from ubuntu-latest is not end-to-end tested in CI.
conclusionsAndRecommendations: Implementation is fully compliant. Refactor applied: removed legacy release.yml and added a Linux binary smoke-test step in the release-binaries job of publish.yml.

refactorPlan.reason: Legacy workflow superseded by release-binaries job in publish.yml.
Add smoke-test step after binary verification to run nvst-linux-x64 --version before uploading release assets.
